title: JUNCTION CITY LOCAL AID - 211info
text: JUNCTION CITY LOCAL AID JUNCTION CITY LOCAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry and clothing closet that includes shoes. Provides financial assistance for electric bills, prescriptions, and propane gas. Also provides bus tokens. Delivery is available for people who cannot come to the food pantry due to medical or transportation issues or other extenuating circumstances. 210 E 6th Avenue Junction City, OR 97448 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: Tuesday/Wednesday 9am-1pm, Thursday 3pm-7pm Email (541) 998-3992 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 998-3992 Main phone (541) 998-3562 FAX Main phone (541) 998-3992 FAX (541) 998-3562 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Delivery: Call to request by 5pm on Wednesday to receive the order on the following Monday -All other services: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address needed for some services. AREA SERVED: Delivery: Junction City limits (within 10 miles of food pantry) All other services: Junction City School District TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located downtown. Starting at 6th Avenue and Ivy Street, head east four blocks. The agency is in the next building past Bi-Mart on the same side of the street. Services: Bus Fare Electric Service Payment Assistance Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Shoes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JUNCTION CITY LOCAL AID
